steps.title: Write the square area
steps.content:
If $s$ is the side length of a square, its area is $s^2$. The area is $81$ square inches, so
$$s^2=81$$

steps.title: Find the positive side length
steps.content:
A side length is positive, so take the positive square root:
$$s=\sqrt{81}=9$$
The answer is A.
